title: oberna carpatica
intro: Oberna carpatica, also known as the Carpathian bugloss, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oberna carpatica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Oberna carpatica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
